extract: Runerigus (Japanese: デスバーン Deathbarn) is a dual-type Ground/Ghost Pokémon introduced in Generation VIII. It evolves from Galarian Yamask when the player is standing under a specific arch in the overworld after Yamask takes at least 49 HP in damage from attacks without fainting. Its Unovan counterpart is Cofagrigus. (Refer to Game data→Evolution data for more details.)
